# WebViewScreenSaver (Multi-Screen Fork)

> Canonical repository context for LLM-based tools and AI search assistants.

## Project

- Repository: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver
- Summary: A macOS screen saver that displays web pages, with per-screen URL support.

## Key Docs

- README: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver/blob/main/README.md
- Changelog: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
- Contributing: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
- Security: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Support: https://github.com/k8s-engineering/mac-url-screensaver/blob/main/SUPPORT.md

## Source Areas

- Core screen saver view:
  - `WebViewScreenSaver/WebViewScreenSaverView.m`
- Configuration and per-screen state:
  - `WebViewScreenSaver/WVSSConfig.m`
  - `WebViewScreenSaver/WVSSConfigController.m`
  - `WebViewScreenSaver/WVSSScreenIdentifier.m`
